【Check product detail images: Premium Full Steel】 M25554 Black Full Leather Bucket Bag Odyssée Handbag From the 2025 Early Autumn collection, cleverly revisiting the Excursion backpack design from the 2024 Cruise collection, paying tribute to the travel heritage with classic brushstrokes. Calfskin body features Monogram Bold pattern, with decorative buckle and detachable chain for exquisite details. Side pocket allows keys or lipstick to travel easily. Dimensions: 27×17×12cm.

items.name_en: hanel 25A Haute Couture Suede Bag
items.name_cn:
hanel 25A Haute Couture Suede Bag
25A Haute Couture Focus of the Hangzhou Show🔥A masterpiece of classic and innovation👏🏻 Inspired by Mademoiselle Chanel's ebony lacquered screen; iconic quilted pattern, meets unique color blocking design, collision of materials💥 Fully displaying luxury;
Large bag body paired with exquisite small bag, “bag on bag” too bold an innovation🤩 Beauty and practicality combined! Super mini “Pearl Heart” CF charm is detachable, can match any large bag! This layered feeling is truly loved🥹
Dimensions: 36x24x12cm

specs.rawTitle:
hanel 25A Haute Couture Suede Bag
25A Haute Couture Focus of the Hangzhou Show🔥A masterpiece of classic and innovation👏🏻 Inspired by Mademoiselle Chanel's ebony lacquered screen; iconic quilted pattern, meets unique color blocking design, collision of materials💥 Fully displaying luxury;
Large bag body paired with exquisite small bag, “bag on bag” too bold an innovation🤩 Beauty and practicality combined! Super mini “Pearl Heart” CF charm is detachable, can match any large bag! This layered feeling is truly loved🥹
Dimensions: 36x24x12cm

items.name_en: OHANEL 🚩🚩🚩 26C Shoulder Bag. Denim, absolutely stunning! The Grand Palais in Paris was decorated into a dreamland, bold and innovative, denim blended with flowing chiffon, lively and unique when walking, this design is god-tier! Denim elements are still strong this season. Denim, also known as denim, has a long history, originally created for jeans, it is a cotton coarse fabric. The classic blue is deeply rooted, now developed into white, black, colorful choices. Current denim trends are retro and deconstruction, washed colors are full of retro vibes; influenced by work pants, loose jeans have large pockets on the sides, practical and stylish. Moreover, designers love to collide various elements with denim💥, adding mystery and sexy vibes. The combination of denim makes casual denim instantly dazzling, becoming the focus of the crowd. Through different fabric thicknesses, weaves, and techniques like washing, cut lines, and frayed edges, various denim items can be created!

items.name_en: .24B Tank Backpack & Large Size Olive Green
items.name_cn:
.24B Tank Backpack & Large Size Olive Green
The new 24B Duma explosive pack is here!
✨This time it's the 24B Tank Backpack Large Size, caviar champagne gold buckle paired with olive green, like a shining star on the fashion battlefield. Every new Duma release this season has been stunning, from retro styles to material and color variations, the 23K duma is fully upgraded! It's like a Transformer, last season it was a "little frog", now it has transformed into a super cool explosive pack. Low center of gravity, three side pockets, substantial and classic, perfectly blending vintage charm with stunning wearability
👜 Caviar champagne gold buckle, lychee grain ball texture material, durable and wear-resistant, like wearing a sturdy armor. Great for hand-carry or backpacking, perfect for styling, making you an instant fashion focal point. Plus, high-saturation colors integrated into the classic duma backpack, full of vitality, combining cuteness and fashion, like a light illuminating your fashion path, come get yours!
Size: 21.5*19.5*12cm
A

items.name_en: .24B Tank Backpack & Large Size
items.name_cn:
.24B Tank Backpack & Large Size
The new 24B Duma explosive pack is here!
This is the 24B Tank Backpack Large Size, paired with caviar champagne gold hardware and olive green, shining like a star on the fashion battlefield. Every season, the Duma collection has been stunning, with diverse changes from retro styles to materials and colors. The 23K duma is fully upgraded! It's like a Transformer; last season it was a "little frog," and now it has transformed into a super cool explosive pack. With a low center of gravity and pockets on three sides, it feels substantial, perfectly blending classic charm with a stunning look.
👜 Caviar champagne gold hardware, ball-grain calfskin material, durable and wear-resistant, like wearing a sturdy armor. The handle and shoulder straps are great, perfect for posing, making you an instant fashion focal point. Plus, high-saturation colors are integrated into the classic duma backpack, full of vitality, combining cuteness and fashion. Like a ray of light, illuminating your fashion path. Come own it!
Size: 21.5*19.5*12cm
A

The new 24B Duma explosive pack is here!

shining like a star on the fashion battlefield. Every season, the Duma collection has been stunning, with diverse changes from retro styles to materials and colors. The 23K duma is fully upgraded! items.name_en: In Stock 25P mini Panda🐼 color backpack
items.name_cn:
In Stock 25P mini Panda🐼 color backpack
The palm-sized mini backpack is right up my alley. Made of lambskin with a quilted design and a small front pocket, it has no unnecessary details. Don't let the size fool you; it can actually hold a phone, lipstick, compact powder, tissues, and other small items. More importantly, it offers multiple carrying styles: backpack, shoulder bag, crossbody, handbag, etc. You can carry it however you like.
Size: 22*18*10cm 99473
